issue.title: Expanding delta-only task packet fixture
issue.body:
## Required Task Fields

```yaml
lane: validation_tooling
intelligence_level: frontier
reason: "Negative fixture keeps issue scope narrower than the task packet."
durable_source_of_truth: "GitHub issue #1002"
objective: "Reject task packet scope expansion."
allowed_paths:
  - scripts/asgk.py
expected_output:
  - compact task packet check fails
plan:
  - compare packet to issue scope
checklist:
  - command fails
acceptance_sheet:
  - expansion is rejected
non_goals:
  - no compact governance default
stop_conditions:
  - packet expands scope
rollback_expectations:
  - revert PR
```

task_packet.intelligence_level_reason: Fixture covers compact governance expansion rejection.
plan: Compare packet allowed paths to issue allowed paths.
